blended.narrative: Horseshoe Resort is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.6 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 8,427 ft. Looking ahead, 24 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Wednesday: 3.6" of snow, highs of 39°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Friday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Sunday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
